privileged_info_summary: The task metadata correctly specifies department names (R&D USA and Research & Development) which are verified to exist in Odoo 17's official HR demo data. However, the target employee Robert Miller is synthetic—not present in Odoo's official demo data but created by the setup script (setup_task.sh, lines 65-71) if not already present. The official Odoo 17 HR demo includes 20 standard employees including Anita Oliver (in R&D USA) and 6 others in Research & Development. Robert Miller is created with synthetic attributes (email: robert.miller@example.com, job_title: Senior Researcher).
